creator: bokutin@bokut.in
text:
The following in the Makefile should work and not download.

MAKE_ENV+=      DISABLE_DIC_DOWNLOAD=1

External dictionaries:
	http://openlab.jp/skk/dic/SKK-JISYO.L.gz
	http://openlab.jp/skk/dic/SKK-JISYO.jinmei.gz
	http://openlab.jp/skk/dic/SKK-JISYO.propernoun.gz
	http://openlab.jp/skk/dic/SKK-JISYO.geo.gz
	http://openlab.jp/skk/dic/SKK-JISYO.station.gz
Do you wish to download these files? [n] n <----- auto select
Okay, the default dictionary is used:
	skk/SKK-JISYO.S
Loading dictionary: skk/SKK-JISYO.S
................ 3371 lines loaded.
Optimizing dictionary: 5748 keywords.
Writing DB_File: lib/Lingua/JA/Romanize/Japanese.bdb
.. 5748 keywords saved.
Done.
